deals.title: Add any easy (medium) hot drink for R25 with breakfast, sandwich or muffin
deals.tip: Use the Mugg & Bean app to earn cashback rewards. Valid at On the Move locations only, not regular Mugg & Bean.

deals.title: Coffee subscription from R18 a cup
deals.tip: 5 coffees R99 (R20/cup) · 10 coffees R199 (R20/cup) · 15 coffees R269 (R18/cup). All easy (medium) sized. Redeem once per day, within 30 days. Valid on: Cappuccino, Americano, Caffé Mocha, Caffé Latte, Filter Coffee. Download the Mugg & Bean app to buy or redeem.

deals.title: FNB eBucks: Kauai vouchers by reward level
deals.tip: Level 1: any short iced or hot drink. Level 2: small (350ml) smoothie. Level 3: large (500ml) smoothie. Level 4: R100 voucher on any item. Level 5: R120 voucher on any item. Aspire: any small (350ml) smoothie.

deals.title: Free smoothie when you achieve your Vitality weekly goal
deals.tip: Note: using this reward will forfeit your weekly game board play to earn miles.

deals.title: Vitality weekly goal: add a meal from R60
deals.tip: Redeem your weekly goal as an instant reward and add a meal: selected Breakfast item from R60 · Sourdough Toastie from R70 · selected Meal item from R93.

deals.title: ClubCard cashback: up to 25% back with Vitality
deals.tip: 1 point per R5 spent (2% back). Spend R600+ for 4% back. Stack PayDay Savings for up to 14% back total. Add Clicks to Discovery Vitality for up to 25% back. Cashback paid on the 20th. Must swipe ClubCard. Points valid 12 months.

deals.title: Buy 2 get 1 free special
deals.tip: Bonus: buy Vitality products to stack and earn extra rewards. Filter by Vitality on the Clicks website.

deals.title: FNB Easy Bundle: 99c bread at Pick n Pay, 4x a month
deals.tip: FNB Easy Bundle customers pay just 99c for a loaf of brown or white bread from Pick n Pay bakeries, up to 4 times a month.

deals.title: FNB Virtual Card: R50 off at Starbucks (R75+ purchase)
deals.tip: Get a complimentary R50-off voucher on any Starbucks purchase of R75+ when you make at least 5 weekly payments using your FNB Virtual Card (or FNB Pay/digital wallets). Valid at participating Starbucks. Premier/Private Clients/RMB: reward level 2+ required. FNBy/FNBy Next: 18+ eligible.

deals.title: #MakeMyMonday: coffee & hot chocolate from R22
deals.tip: R22 for 240ml · R27 for 350ml · R32 for 480ml. Every Monday only. Redeem on the Krispy Kreme app.

deals.title: #ChillerTuesday: two 350ml Chillers for 50% off
deals.tip: Every Tuesday only. Redeem on the Krispy Kreme app.

deals.title: Free doughnut just for downloading the Krispy Kreme app
deals.tip: Find the reward under the Offers tab after downloading the Krispy Kreme app.

deals.title: Birthday bonus: buy a dozen, get a dozen Original Glazed free
deals.tip: Download the app at least 48 hours before your birthday to qualify.
